rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §33.0815, which governs student club authorization and parental consent requirements in school districts.
quote: A school district or open-enrollment charter school may not authorize or sponsor a student club based on sexual orientation or gender identity.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns student clubs, not property tax exemptions.
